narration: What if your body sent messages that could start a storm?
visual_description: Hook visual: What if your body sent messages that could start a storm?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What if your body sent messages that could start a storm?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: What if your body sent messages that could start a storm?

narration: Cytokines are like text messages for immune cells, guiding responses to infections.
visual_description: Context visual: Cytokines are like text messages for immune cells, guiding responses to infections.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Cytokines are like text messages for immune cells, guiding responses to infections.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Cytokines are like text messages for immune cells, guiding responses to infections.

narration: But what happens when those messages go haywire?
visual_description: Escalation visual: But what happens when those messages go haywire?
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But what happens when those messages go haywire?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But what happens when those messages go haywire?

narration: In a cytokine storm, excessive signals can overwhelm the body, leading to severe inflammation.
visual_description: Evidence visual: In a cytokine storm, excessive signals can overwhelm the body, leading to severe inflammation.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: In a cytokine storm, excessive signals can overwhelm the body, leading to severe inflammation.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: In a cytokine storm, excessive signals can overwhelm the body, leading to severe inflammation.

narration: This dysregulation may contribute to conditions like COVID-19, but research is ongoing.
visual_description: Payoff visual: This dysregulation may contribute to conditions like COVID-19, but research is ongoing.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: This dysregulation may contribute to conditions like COVID-19, but research is ongoing.
